falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes below the 200-day moving average by more than 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed downtrend, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of a bear market.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% above the 30-day average on a single day, accompanied by a 10%+ price drop
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a blowoff volume spike with sharp price decline would invalidate the 'HOLD' by confirming a panic-driven sell-off, not a bottom formation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above its 2024 August peak by 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would directly contradict the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern match, proving the current market is in a bullish phase, not a bottoming process.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
